zh.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon是Amedee Montfaucon I和Beatrix的女兒，出生。她於1166年之前與Comte Érard II de Brienne結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1200年，埋葬在黎巴嫩莫特 勒班農阿比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon是Amedee Montfaucon I和Beatrix的女儿，出生。她于1166年之前与Comte Érard II de Brienne结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1200年，埋葬在黎巴嫩莫特 勒班農阿比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon was born as the daughter of Amedee Montfaucon I and Beatrix. She married Comte Érard II de Brienne before 1166. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1200, and was buried in Abey, Mount Lebanon, Lebanon.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon est née, fille de Amedee Montfaucon I et Beatrix. Elle a épousé Comte Érard II de Brienne avant 1166. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1200, et a été enterrée à Abey, Mont-Liban, Liban.

de.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon wurde, als Tochter von Amedee Montfaucon I und Beatrix geboren. Sie hat vor 1166 Comte Érard II de Brienne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1200 und wurde in Abey, Mont-Liban, Libanon begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon è nata il come figlia di Amedee Montfaucon I e Beatrix. Lei sposato Comte Érard II de Brienne prima del 1166. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1200, e fu sepolta a Abey, Mont-Liban, Libano.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de MontfauconはAmedee Montfaucon IとBeatrixの娘として生まれた。1166年以前にComte Érard II de Brienneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1200年に死去し，レバノンモウント レバノンアベイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon(은)는 Amedee Montfaucon I(와)과 Beatrix의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1166년 이전 Comte Érard II de Brienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 사망했으며 레바논 모우트 레바넌 압이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon nasceu filha de Amedee Montfaucon I e Beatrix. Ela casou-se com Comte Érard II de Brienne antes 1166. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1200, e foi sepultada em Abey, Mont-Liban, Líbano.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon родилась. Её родителей звали Amedee Montfaucon I и Beatrix. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Comte Érard II de Brienne перед 1166 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1200 г. и была похоронена в местности аби, маунт лебанон, Ливан.

es.lifeSummary: Agnès de Montfaucon nació como hija de Amedee Montfaucon I y Beatrix. Se casó con Comte Érard II de Brienne antes de 1166. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1200, y fue sepultada en Abey, Mont-Liban, Líbano.
